message:
test(fcp-core): regenerate golden test vectors with updated key IDs

Updates CBOR test vectors after key material regeneration:

- enrollment/request_vectors.cbor: New signing/encryption/issuance key
  hex identifiers for device enrollment test cases
- simulate/simulate_request_vectors.cbor: Aligned with updated schema

Key changes reflect regenerated test key material used for cryptographic
operation testing. The vector structure remains unchanged; only the
embedded key identifiers differ.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
